arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Thomas Partey stalls on Arsenal contract as Barcelona circle
arts.sum: FootballTransfers understands that Thomas Partey is taking his time before making a final decision on a new contract at Arsenal, with interest from Barcelona adding extra intrigue to the situation. EXCLUSIVE: Thomas Partey stalls on Arsenal contract as Barcelona circle

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick provides update on Barcelona contract talks
arts.sum: Hansi Flick signed only a two-year contract when he succeeded Xavi as Barcelona manager.

arts.ttl: Dortmund travel to team hotel without duo ahead of Barcelona clash
